summary: All three requirements (REQ-1, REQ-2, REQ-3) appear to be missing implementation. REQ-1 and REQ-2 are partially implemented in ActivitySection.tsx with the History toggle, but REQ-3 (repositioning submit/cancel buttons below DocumentsSection) is not implemented in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Move the submit and cancel button section in the phone screen to appear below the document section in the case detail layout
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows modifications to ActivitySection.tsx and CaseDetail.tsx, but the CaseDetail.tsx content is truncated. No evidence shows the submit/cancel buttons being moved to appear after DocumentsSection component. The truncated CaseDetail.tsx file does not show any JSX restructuring that would relocate these buttons.
